km.Wakehurst, Sussex, England: សូសេក្, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, អូនីតេដគីងដូម

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I是Father Wakehurst和Mother Wakehurst的兒子，於1246年出生在英國英格蘭素可。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1309年享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I是Father Wakehurst和Mother Wakehurst的儿子，于1246年出生在英国英格兰素可。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1309年享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wakehurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wakehurst Place in Ardingly (Sussex).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I was born in 1246, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom as the son of Father Wakehurst and Mother Wakehurst. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1309, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I est né en 1246, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Father Wakehurst et Mother Wakehurst. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1309, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I wurde 1246 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Father Wakehurst und Mother Wakehurst geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1309 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I è nato il nel 1246 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Father Wakehurst e Mother Wakehurst. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1309, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Wakehurst, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst Iは1246年にイギリスイギリススセックスでFather WakehurstとMother Wakehurstの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1309年に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I(은)는 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Father Wakehurst(와)과 Mother Wakehurst의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1309년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I nasceu em 1246, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Father Wakehurst e Mother Wakehurst. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1309, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I родился в 1246 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Father Wakehurst и Mother Wakehurst. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1309 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst I nació en 1246, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Father Wakehurst y Mother Wakehurst. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1309, a la edad de 63 años.
